who: logistics supervisors at freight carriers processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For logistics supervisors at freight carriers processing 10-20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause supplier penalties. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and shipment records.
problem: Discrepancies between freight invoices and shipment records
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics supervisors
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach with demo video to logistics supervisors
Community forums for sharing tools among supervisors
try_it: Let users try manual entry and receive alerts for 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
